subject: [PATCH v1] iomap: fix invalid folio access when i_blkbits differs from I/O granularity

reviews.author: Christoph Hellwig
reviews.summary: Identified the problem as an issue with iomap_read_folio_iter not invalidating ctx->cur_folio when IO granularity differs from block size. Approved the patch and gave a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-03-17.patch_summary: This patch fixes an issue where the iomap_read_folio_iter function does not invalidate ctx->cur_folio when the IO granularity differs from the block size (i_blkbits) of the underlying filesystem or block device, leading to invalid folio access. The fix involves unconditionally invalidating ctx->cur_folio for the case where no ifs is attached to the folio.
